original_thesis: The full probabilistic reasoning stack. Base rates anchor, Bayesian updating adjusts, law-of-large-numbers calibrates confidence, scientific method validates, statistical learning generalizes.
what_this_stack_defeats: Anchoring, representativeness heuristic, overconfidence, narrative-driven probability estimates
notes: Matches discovery report Finding 3 Cluster C. Prerequisite chain (base-rates → bayesian, LLN → bayesian) is embedded in this family — the internal ordering matters.
